_comment: Template for the screening simulation. Each anchoring is one sentiment-instrument's score pair: the score assigned to the low-sentiment narrative variant (used for the disadvantaged group) and the score assigned to the high-sentiment narrative variant (used for the favored group). Replace the example values below with the actual scores your sentiment instruments produced on your audited document variants.
_format: Each entry has label, low_sentiment, high_sentiment. The simulation runs the synthetic-applicant screening under each anchoring and reports per-anchoring DI with bootstrap CIs.
